hooks.command: SESS="$TERM_SESSION_ID"; PANE="$TMUX_PANE"; SOCK=$(echo "$TMUX" | cut -d, -f1); terminal-notifier -message 'Work complete — check the terminal' -title 'Claude Code' -sound Glass -execute "$HOME/.claude/iterm-focus.sh '$SESS' '$PANE' '$SOCK'"

SESS="$TERM_SESSION_ID"; PANE="$TMUX_PANE"; SOCK=$(echo "$TMUX" | cut -d, -f1); terminal-notifier -message 'Claude needs your attention' -title 'Claude Code' -sound Ping -execute "$HOME/.claude/iterm-focus.sh '$SESS' '$PANE' '$SOCK'"
